title: VedicAstro Chart Export
description: Complete Vedic astrology birth chart export from VedicAstro engine v0.5. Contains D1 rasi chart, Bhava Chalit, 16 divisional charts, Vimshottari Dasha, Ashtakavarga, Shadbala, Jaimini system, and special points.

ayanamsaValue.description: Ayanamsa precession value in degrees at birth time

birthData.description: Input birth data used for calculation

timeZoneOffsetSeconds.description: Timezone offset from UTC in seconds (e.g. 19800 for +5:30)

hasBirthTime.description: Whether exact birth time is known. If false, ascendant and houses are omitted.

rasiChart.description: D1 Rasi (natal) chart — the primary birth chart with all planetary positions

ascendant.description: Lagna (ascendant) position. Null if birth time unknown.

planets.description: All 9 Vedic grahas in order: Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu

house.description: Whole Sign house number (1-12) from Lagna. Null if no birth time.

isRetrograde.description: True if planet appears to move backward (negative speed in longitude)

houseCusps.description: 12 house cusp longitudes in degrees. Null if no birth time.

divisionalCharts.description: 16 Shodasha Varga divisional charts, sorted by division number (D1, D2, D3, D4, D7, D9, D10, D12, D16, D20, D24, D27, D30, D40, D45, D60). Each chart maps planetary longitudes to varga signs using BPHS formulas.

ascendantSign.description: Lagna sign in this varga. Null if no birth time.

placements.description: Planet-to-sign mappings in this varga, in standard order

vimshottariDasha.description: Vimshottari Dasha system — 120-year planetary period cycle based on Moon's nakshatra at birth. Contains current running period and full Maha/Antar dasha timeline.

currentDasha.description: Currently running dasha period at export time

mahaDashas.description: Complete Maha Dasha sequence (9 periods totaling ~120 years)

planet.description: Ruling planet of this Maha Dasha

pratyantarDashas.description: Sub-sub-periods within this Antar Dasha (9 per Antar)

ashtakavarga.description: Ashtakavarga benefic point system per BPHS. bpiBindus = Bhinnashtakavarga (per planet, 12 signs). sarvashtakavarga = sum of all 7 BAV tables. Invariant: SAV total always = 337.

bpiBindus.description: Bhinnashtakavarga — per planet bindus across 12 signs. Key = planet name. Each planet has 'bindus' array (12 integers, index 0=Aries) and computed 'total'.

sarvashtakavarga.description: Sarvashtakavarga — sum of all 7 BAV tables. 'bindus' array (12 integers, index 0=Aries). Total always = 337.

shadbala.description: Shadbala — six-fold planetary strength in virupas (1/60 rupa). Currently computes: Sthana Bala (Uchcha + Saptavargaja + Ojhayugmarasi + Kendradi + Drekkana), Dig Bala, Kala Bala (Naisargika + Paksha). Remaining components (Natonnata, Tribhaga, Ayana, Cheshta, Drig) require sunrise/sunset data.

planetBala.description: Per-planet strength breakdown. Key = planet name.

uchchaBala.description: Exaltation strength (0-60 virupas). Max at deep exaltation, 0 at deep debilitation.

saptavargajaBala.description: Dignity in 7 vargas. Currently basic (own=30, exalt=20, debil=5, neutral=10).

ojhayugmarasiBala.description: Odd/even sign + navamsa strength (0, 15, or 30 virupas).

kendradiBala.description: Angular house strength: kendra(1,4,7,10)=60, panapara(2,5,8,11)=30, apoklima(3,6,9,12)=15.

drekkanaBala.description: Decanate strength (0 or 15). Male planets gain in 1st decanate, neutral in 2nd, female in 3rd.

digBala.description: Directional strength (0-60). Ju/Me strongest in 1st, Su/Ma in 10th, Sa in 7th, Mo/Ve in 4th.

naisargikaBala.description: Fixed natural strength: Su=60, Mo=51.43, Ve=42.86, Ju=34.29, Me=25.71, Ma=17.14, Sa=8.57.

pakshaBala.description: Lunar phase strength (0-60). Benefics stronger in waxing Moon, malefics in waning.

jaimini.description: Jaimini astrology system calculations — Chara Karakas, Karakamsa, Ishta Devta, and Arudha Lagnas

charaKarakas.description: Chara (movable) Karakas — planets ranked by degree-in-sign. Atmakaraka (AK) = highest degree = soul significator. 8-karaka system includes Rahu (inverted: 30 - degree).

ranking.description: Sorted list from highest to lowest degree-in-sign

degreeInSign.description: Degree within sign (0-30). For Rahu: 30 - actual degree.

karakamsa.description: Karakamsa — the Navamsa (D9) sign of the Atmakaraka. Foundation for Jaimini predictions.

planetsInKarakamsa.description: Planets in the Karakamsa sign (in D9)

houseFromLagna.description: House number of Karakamsa from D1 Lagna

ishtaDevta.description: Ishta Devta (chosen deity). Method: 12th sign from Karakamsa in D1 chart. If planet present → that planet's deity. If empty → sign lord's deity.

planetsInTwelfth.description: Planets in that 12th sign in D1 (may be empty)

significator.description: Planet determining the deity (occupant or sign lord)

arudhaLagnas.description: Arudha Lagnas for all 12 houses. Arudha = project lord's distance from house back from lord. BPHS exception: if result lands in same house or 7th, use 10th instead.

arudhas.description: House number (1-12) → Sign name mapping. Key houses: 1=Pada Lagna (AL), 7=Darapada, 12=Upapada (UL).

bhavaChalit.description: Bhava Chalit chart — equal house system where the Ascendant is the midpoint of the 1st bhava. Each bhava spans exactly 30°. Planets may shift houses compared to Rasi (whole sign) chart.

cusps.description: 12 bhava sandhi (cusp start) longitudes in degrees. Cusp N = Asc + (N-1)*30 - 15°.

madhyas.description: 12 bhava midpoint longitudes in degrees. Madhya N = Asc + (N-1)*30°.

planets.description: Planet placements in bhava houses, with shift detection

rasiHouse.description: Whole sign house (1-12). Null if no birth time.

shifted.description: True if planet shifted houses from Rasi to Bhava Chalit

specialPoints.description: Special calculated points in the chart

bhriguBindu.description: Bhrigu Bindu — midpoint of Moon and Rahu (shorter arc). A highly sensitive transit trigger point. When planets transit this degree, significant life events manifest. The SAV score at this sign indicates whether results are favorable (high SAV) or challenging (low SAV).

savScore.description: Sarvashtakavarga bindu count at this sign. Higher = more favorable transit results.
